steps.title: Translate the tangent ratio
steps.content:
For angle $C$ in the right triangle, tangent is opposite over adjacent:
$$\tan(C)=\frac{AB}{BC}=\frac{3}{4}$$
So write the legs as $AB=3k$ and $BC=4k$.

steps.title: Use the hypotenuse
steps.content:
The figure shows the hypotenuse $AC$ is $25$. Use the Pythagorean theorem:
$$(3k)^2+(4k)^2=25^2$$
$$9k^2+16k^2=625$$
$$25k^2=625$$
$$k=5$$
